title: ischyrolepis laniger
intro: Ischyrolepis laniger, also known as the woolly ischyrolepis, is a type of flowering plant in the family Asteliaceae, native to New Zealand. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. Ischyrolepis laniger is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as exhibiting potential antioxidant and antimicrobial activities. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, tinctures, and salves, which are used to treat a range of health conditions, including skin irritations and minor wounds.
